tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold
tasks.description:
SPM executable + Info.plist + .gitignore + scaffold @main.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Package.swift","Info.plist",".gitignore","Sources/DS4Control/DS4ControlApp.swift"],"verifyCommand":"swift build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/b.log && ! grep -i warning /tmp/b.log","acceptanceCriteria":["swift build zero warnings"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Variant + Quant model
tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files":["Sources/DS4Control/Model/Variant.swift","Tests/DS4ControlTests/VariantTests.swift"],"verifyCommand":"swift test --filter VariantTests","acceptanceCriteria":["kv pro=39040 flash=27520","ceiling pro=1M flash=393216","gguf filenames + weightsGiB"]}
```

